name: ARGB ↔ Int
description: Convert between ARGB color values and signed 32-bit integer representations used in DayZ configs. Includes a visual color picker and reverse integer-to-RGBA conversion.

name: Price Calculator
description: Visualize dynamic pricing curves based on stock thresholds and item modifiers. Replicates the exact sell/buy price logic from ExpansionMarketModule.

name: JSON Validator
description: Validate your JSON configuration files against predefined templates.

name: Config Diff
description: Compare two JSON configs side-by-side and see highlighted differences. Load configs from the config directory for quick comparison.

name: Icon Browser
description: Browse, search, and preview all available Expansion icons for use in your configuration files.

name: Quest Editor
description: Visual node-graph editor for building Expansion quest chains with draggable nodes, bezier connections, objectives, rewards, and ZIP import/export.

name: Market Editor
description: Full-featured editor for Expansion market category and trader JSON files. Import/export ZIP archives, inline editing, validation, and bulk operations.

name: Hardline Editor
description: Configure Expansion Hardline settings — reputation, item rarity tiers, entity values, and market gating. Generates HardlineSettings.json.

name: Settings Editor
description: Create and edit Expansion config files — SafeZones, BaseBuilding, Trader Zones, AI Patrols, Player Spawns, and Map Markers with a visual map editor.

name: Loadout Editor
description: Build and manage spawn loadout JSON files with a visual equipment editor, tree view, multi-file tabs, and full import/export support.
